proof: function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](g)

function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0.val, x1.val)) = pointwise_function_add[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { x0 + x1 = pointwise_function_add[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0).val(x1) = x0(x1) }[T, A](pointwise_add[T, A](f.val, g.val), t)

goal: pointwise_add[T, A](f.val, g.val, t) = f.val(t) + g.val(t)
proof: function[T0, T1: Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, A](f.val, g.val, t)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0).val(x1) = x0(x1) }[T, A](pointwise_zero[T, A], t)
function[T0, T1: Zero] { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](pointwise_zero[T0, T1]) = pointwise_function_zero[T0, T1] }[T, A]
function[T0, T1: Zero] { Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] = pointwise_function_zero[T0, T1] }[T, A]
function[T0: Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
function[T0, T1: Neg](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](pointwise_neg[T0, T1](x0.val)) = pointwise_function_neg[T0, T1](x0) }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0).val(x1) = x0(x1) }[T, A](pointwise_neg[T, A](f.val), t)
function[T0: Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[A, T](f.val, t)

function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x0.val, x1.val)) = pointwise_function_mul[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { x0 * x1 = pointwise_function_mul[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0).val(x1) = x0(x1) }[T, A](pointwise_mul[T, A](f.val, g.val), t)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, A](f.val, g.val, t) = f.val(t) * g.val(t)
proof: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A, T](f.val, t, g.val)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0).val(x1) = x0(x1) }[T, A](pointwise_one[T, A], t)
function[T0, T1: One] { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](pointwise_one[T0, T1]) = pointwise_function_one[T0, T1] }[T, A]
function[T0, T1: One] { One.1[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] = pointwise_function_one[T0, T1] }[T, A]
function[T0: One, T1](x0: T1) { T0.1 = pointwise_one[T1, T0](x0) }[A, T](t)
function[T0: AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](f.val(t), g.val(t), h.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f + g + h)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f + (g + h))
function[T0: AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](g.val(t), f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f + g)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](g + f)
function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f + Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] + f)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f + -f)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](-f + f)
function[T0: Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[A](f.val(t), g.val(t), h.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * g * h)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * (g * h))
function[T0: CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[A](g.val(t), f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * g)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](g * f)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] * f)

goal: f.val(t) * (g.val(t) + h.val(t)) = f.val(t) * g.val(t) + f.val(t) * h.val(t)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[A](f.val(t), g.val(t), h.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * (g + h))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * g + f * h)

goal: (f.val(t) + g.val(t)) * h.val(t) = f.val(t) * h.val(t) + g.val(t) * h.val(t)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[A](f.val(t), h.val(t), g.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A]((f + g) * h)
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * h + g * h)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](f * Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { T0.0 * x0 = T0.0 }[A](f.val(t))
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { PointwiseFunction.new[T0, T1](x0.val) = x0 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] * f)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](f, g), h)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](g, h)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](f, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](g, h))

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x1: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add(x0, Add.add(x1, x2)) = Add.add(Add.add(x0, x1), x2) }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], k1: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](k0, k1)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k0), k1) } }

let w1: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, k2)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), k2) } }

let w2: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, w2)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), w2) }

let w3: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k3: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, k3)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), k3) } }

let w4: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w4)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), w4) }

let w5: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w5)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), w5) }

function[T0, T1: AddSemigroup](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x2: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1), x2) = Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x1, x2)) }[T, A](w0, w3, w5)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](g, f)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x1: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add(x0, x1) = Add.add(x1, x0) }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](k0, w0) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k0) } }
let w1: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, w0) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1) }
let w2: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w2, w0) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w2) }

function[T0, T1: AddCommSemigroup](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x1, x0) }[T, A](w0, w2)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](f, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], f)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add(Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], x0) = x0 }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], w0) != w0 }
function[T0, T1: AddMonoid](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]], x0) = x0 }[T, A](w0)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add(x0, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]]) = x0 }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]]) != w0 }
function[T0, T1: AddMonoid](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]]) = x0 }[T, A](w0)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](f, Neg.neg[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](f))
function[T0, T1: Neg](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Neg.neg[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0) = -x0 }[T, A](f)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add(x0, Neg.neg(x0)) = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Neg.neg[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0)) != Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] }
function[T0, T1: AddGroup](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, Neg.neg[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0)) = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] }[T, A](w0)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](f, g), h)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](g, h)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](g, h))

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x1: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(x0, Mul.mul(x1, x2)) = Mul.mul(Mul.mul(x0, x1), x2) }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], k1: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](k0, k1)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k0), k1) } }

let w1: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, k2)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), k2) } }

let w2: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, w2)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), w2) }

let w3: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k3: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, k3)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), k3) } }

let w4: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w4)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), w4) }

let w5: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w5)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), w5) }

function[T0, T1: Semigroup](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x2: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1), x2) = Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x1, x2)) }[T, A](w0, w3, w5)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](g, f)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x1: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(x0, x1) = Mul.mul(x1, x0) }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](k0, w0) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k0) } }
let w1: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, w0) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1) }
let w2: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w2, w0) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w2) }
function[T0, T1: CommSemigroup](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x1, x0) }[T, A](w0, w2)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], f)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], x0) = x0 }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], w0) != w0 }
function[T0, T1: Monoid](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](One.1[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]], x0) = x0 }[T, A](w0)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(x0, One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]]) = x0 }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, One.1[PointwiseFunction[T, A]]) != w0 }
function[T0, T1: Monoid](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, One.1[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]]) = x0 }[T, A](w0)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, g + h)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, h)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, g)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](g, h)

function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](f, g), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](f, h))
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f + g, h)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](g, h)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, h)
function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](f, g)

function[T0, T1: Add](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 + x1 }[T, A](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](f, h), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](g, h))
function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { x0 * Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](f, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]])
function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] * x0 = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] }[T, A](f)
function[T0, T1: Mul](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[T, A](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], f)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x1: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(x0, Add.add(x1, x2)) = Add.add(Mul.mul(x0, x1), Mul.mul(x0, x2)) }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], k1: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](k0, k1)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k0), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k1)) } }

let w1: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, k2)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k2)) } }

let w2: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w2)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, w2)) }

let w3: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k3: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, k3)) != Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k3)) } }

let w4: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w4)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w4)) }

let w5: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w5)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w5)) }

function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x2: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x2)) = Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x1, x2)) }[T, A](w0, w3, w5)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x1: PointwiseFunction[T, A], x2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(Add.add(x0, x1), x2) = Add.add(Mul.mul(x0, x2), Mul.mul(x1, x2)) }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k0: PointwiseFunction[T, A], k1: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k1), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](k0, k1)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k0), k1) } }

let w1: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k2: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k2), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, k2)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), k2) } }

let w2: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w2), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w1, w2)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w1), w2) }

let w3: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { exists(k3: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, k3), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, k3)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), k3) } }

let w4: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w4), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w4)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), w4) }

let w5: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w5), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w3, w5)) != Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, w3), w5) }

function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x1: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1], x2: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x1), Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x2, x1)) = Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Add.add[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, x2), x1) }[T, A](w0, w5, w3)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(x0, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]]) = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](w0, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]]) != Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] }
function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](x0, Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]]) = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] }[T, A](w0)

goal: forall(x0: PointwiseFunction[T, A]) { Mul.mul(Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], x0) = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] }
proof: let w0: PointwiseFunction[T, A] satisfy { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T, A]](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]], w0) != Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T, A]] }
function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]) { Mul.mul[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]](Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]], x0) = Zero.0[PointwiseFunction[T0, T1]] }[T, A](w0)
